name: Squash and Two Potatoes with Chicken on Pasta with Passion
recipeIngredient: 1 medium red skinned potato, scrubbed, cooked, and cubed
2 ounces angel hair pasta, broken into thirds
4 teaspoons Jump Up Hot Sauce with Passion
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook potatoes in the microwave until just done. Let cool before cutting into 1/2 to 3/4-inch cubes to yield about 1 cup combined potatoes per serving.
2. Cook shortened pasta until al dente in plenty of boiling water seasoned with a halved garlic clove. Drain, rinse, and set aside.
3. Cut the skinless boneless chicken breast meat into diagonal strips, then cut strips into bite-sized pieces. Toss the chicken with the oils to coat.
4. Heat a wok to high; add the chicken to sear. When most of the pink has disappeared from the meat, sprinkle nuts (if using), add sweet onion, and cook for 2 minutes more.
5. Add red bell pepper, cilantro, and green onion and cook about 2 minutes.
6. Mix cornstarch with broth. Make a well in the wok and pour in the sauce. Cook to thicken about 2 minutes, then add hot sauce and orange juice. Arrange squash and cooked potatoes on top.
7. Reduce heat to medium; cover and cook until heated through. Taste and adjust seasoning with more hot sauce, black pepper (if desired). Add pasta and toss to warm and distribute.
8. Serve immediately.
